zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Holand IV於大約1311年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Robert de Holand III35歲，母親Maud la Zouche25歲。他和Margery Heaton至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1373年3月16日在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利享年63歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Holand IV于大约1311年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Robert de Holand III35岁，母亲Maud la Zouche25岁。他和Margery Heaton至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1373年3月16日在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利享年63岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Holand IV was born about 1311, in Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Holand III, was 35 and his mother, Maud la Zouche, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Margery Heaton. He died on 16 March 1373, in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Holand IV est né environ 1311, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Holand III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud la Zouche, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Margery Heaton. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1373, à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Holand IV um 1311 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Holand III 35 und seine Mutter Maud la Zouche 25. Er hatte mit Margery Heaton mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. März 1373 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Holand IV è nato il circa 1311 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Holand III, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Maud la Zouche, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Margery Heaton. Morì il 16 marzo 1373, nel Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Holand IVが約1311年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Holand IIIは35歳，母Maud la Zoucheは25歳であった。彼はMargery Heatonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1373年3月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーで63歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Holand IV(이)가 대략 1311년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Holand III(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud la Zouche(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margery Heaton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1373년 3월 16일 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Holand IV nasceu aproximadamente 1311, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Holand III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud la Zouche, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Margery Heaton. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1373, em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Holand IV родился около 1311 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Holand III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud la Zouche, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Margery Heaton. Он умер 16 марта 1373 г. в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Holand IV nació aproximadamente 1311, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Holand III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud la Zouche, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Margery Heaton. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1373, en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
